---
title: "Farhan (Adin) Aditya R."
subtitle: "Economics · Policy · Data"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
- id: research
  contents: webpages/projects/research/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 3
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
- id: analysis
  contents: webpages/projects/analysis/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 3
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
- id: blog
  contents: webpages/projects/blog/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 3
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero-section">
  <div class="content-block">
    <div class="hero-label">Economics · Policy · Data</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">Farhan Aditya<br>Ramadhan</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Applied econometrician and policy analyst working at the intersection of historical economics, public finance, and development policy in Indonesia.</p>
    <div class="hero-tags">
      <span class="tag">Historical Economics</span>
      <span class="tag">Macroeconomics</span>
      <span class="tag">Political Economy</span>
      <span class="tag">Development Economics</span>
      <span class="tag">Public Finance</span>
      <span class="tag">Applied Econometrics</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="about.qmd" class="btn-primary">About Me</a>
      <a href="webpages/projects/analysis.qmd" class="btn-secondary">View Analysis →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

## Research

:::{#research}
:::

[More →](webpages/projects/research.qmd)

---

## Analysis

:::{#analysis}
:::

[More →](webpages/projects/analysis.qmd)

---

## Blog

:::{#blog}
:::

[More →](webpages/projects/blog.qmd)
